title: 2026–2027 Tech Internships
tagline: Software engineering, data science, security, product, and design internships in the United States. Every listing is verified open and comes directly from a company career page.
description: 2026–2027 tech internships in the US, updated daily. Software engineering, data science, security, product, and design intern roles.
keywords: 2026–2027 tech internships (software engineering, data science, security, product, design) in the United States

siblings.label: New Grad Software Engineer Jobs: entry-level roles for graduates
Remote Tech Jobs: fully remote engineering roles
Senior Software Engineer Jobs: senior, staff, and principal engineering roles

faq.q: How often is this list updated?
faq.a: Once a day. A GitHub Action pulls new internship postings from Dreamwork's public API, which crawls company career pages directly (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Workday, and others). Use <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>F</kbd> for software engineering, data science, ML, product, or design roles.

faq.q: Which season are these internships for?
faq.a: Whatever companies are hiring for right now. In 2026 that is primarily Fall 2026, Spring 2027, and Summer 2027. New season postings appear here the day Dreamwork first verifies them.
This board is intentionally limited to verified-open US tech internships with an internship or co-op title. Closed, duplicate, non-US, and non-tech roles are removed automatically.
The companion list, New Grad Software Engineer Jobs, covers entry-level full-time roles with the same daily refresh.

faq.q: Can Dreamwork match these roles to my resume?
faq.a: Yes. Dreamwork ranks every role against your resume, goals, seniority, and location. Seeing your matches is free.
